overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a coastal shantytown at night. The character moves through wooden dock structures, enters a boat workshop, and continues through elevated walkways to a waterfront bar. The environment features warm string lights against a stormy night sky with Southeast Asian fishing village aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront fishing village square with stilt houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward a wooden boat house while holding a lit torch

notable_agents.action: figure standing near the boat house entrance in the distance

entered.detail: large wooden structure on stilts with open doorway and red hand print symbol
festive string lights crisscrossing above the waterfront area
red spherical lanterns hanging near the building entrance
white plastic chair sitting on the dock near a wooden post

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open waterfront area at night, approaching a wooden boat house built on stilts over the water. String lights and red lanterns illuminate the scene while storm clouds gather overhead. A plastic chair sits near a wooden barrel on the right as the character heads toward the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered boat workshop with docked vessel and workbench

events.description: character enters the wooden boat house from the exterior waterfront

agents.ego_description: entering the workshop and approaching a mechanic working on a boat engine

notable_agents.action: mechanic in yellow shirt working on boat engine with tools

entered.detail: large red and gray fishing boat docked inside the workshop on wooden supports
cluttered workbench with various tools and equipment
red gas cylinders and fuel tanks near the workbench
stack of sandbags piled against the wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the wooden boat house, the character approaches a docked fishing boat where a mechanic in a yellow shirt works on the engine. The space contains workbenches with tools, red gas cylinders, and sandbags. Warm artificial lighting illuminates the interior workshop as the character moves along the docked vessel.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior dock walkways on stilts over choppy water

events.description: character exits the boat house back to the exterior waterfront docks

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated wooden docks and walkways overlooking the water

entered.detail: choppy dark water visible between the wooden dock planks
wooden support pillars holding up the shantytown structures
faint lights from distant buildings across the water
small green-covered boat moored alongside the dock

segments.scene_description: The character exits the workshop onto exterior wooden docks built on stilts over choppy water. The walkway features rope railings and passes a small moored boat. Distant shore lights twinkle across the water while string lights continue overhead, leading toward a two-story structure with stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated covered walkway between wooden shacks

events.description: character ascends wooden stairs to upper level walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs and proceeding through a narrow covered walkway

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase leading to upper level of the shantytown
tattered fabric awning covering the elevated walkway
blue and brown tarps covering the wooden walls of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep wooden staircase to an upper-level covered walkway. The narrow corridor features fabric canopies overhead and tarp-covered walls on the right. String lights continue to illuminate the path as the character moves through this elevated section of the shantytown toward an open bar area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air waterfront bar with counter and patrons

events.description: character enters the waterfront bar from the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the bar past patrons and approaching the counter

notable_agents.action: bartender in white shirt and cap standing behind the counter
patron in green jacket walking toward the bar entrance

entered.detail: long wooden bar counter with taps and red plastic cups
white vintage refrigerator against the back wall
silver boombox sitting on the bar counter
wooden stools lined up along the bar counter

segments.scene_description: The character enters a lively waterfront bar with a wooden counter, stools, and several patrons. A bartender in a white shirt stands behind the counter near a boombox radio, while string lights and spherical lamps illuminate the space. The character moves through the moderate crowd toward the bar area, passing a white refrigerator and various seated customers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open waterfront area into the heart of a bustling coastal shantytown at night. It begins by approaching a wooden boat house on stilts under gathering storm clouds, passing red lanterns and a plastic chair before entering the building. As the camera moves inside, the scene shifts into a warm, cluttered workshop where a mechanic works on a docked fishing boat amidst tools and gas cylinders. The perspective then exits back onto the choppy water, gliding along rope-railed docks and ascending a steep wooden staircase into a narrow, canopy-covered elevated walkway. Finally, the path opens into a lively waterfront bar, moving through a crowd of patrons and past a white refrigerator toward a bartender standing behind a wooden counter.
